test

I don't know how it's possible in 2026, but 8.8.8.8 just tried to connect to our port 9987 (that port is closed and we do not use TeamSpeak).  I have no idea what kind of shady ISP allows forged IP spoofed packets to go out in 2026 but it just happened.
